Current Rules 

            

            

          

          

            
          


          
Match & Replace

          

            Rewrite request/response content in flight. Type is one of:
            request_header, request_body,
            response_header, response_body.
            Match is a Go regex, Replace supports $1 capture groups.
            Scope is an optional host substring filter (empty = all hosts).
          

          

          

            + Add new rule
